section.title: Technology Requirements
section.p: The assignments for this course include using an online homework system. Also we will use free browser-based graphing apps. Therefore you should have access to a computer, laptop, tablet, or phone that can access the internet and use a web browser.

The assignments also include worksheets, and it is preferred that you scan and post your completed worksheets into the D2L Assignments area. So you should have access to a scanner or canning app. Adobe Scan (with accessibility resources) is a free smartphone app for scanning documents that you could use. There are many other similar apps you could explore. With a scanning app, you take multiple photos with your phone, then click something when you are done. And the app produces a single PDF file with each picture on its own page.
I recommend that you have access to a device where Zoom is installed, in case we need to meet over Zoom at some point. See Zoom's website for instructions on how to install Zoom.
